channel.title: Work From Home on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Work From Home on PepsFeeder

item.title: Self-Management in the Modern Economy: Productivity Systems and Financial Discipline
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Here are 5 tricks to raise your productivity if working on your own or from home Self-employment is now gaining more importance, but private work is not easy, especially when it is from home.
